name: The Appetite-Halls
descriptionSeed: Where the Choir does its real work: naming, out loud, the wants people cannot admit to. It is a confession that is not a confession, because nobody is forgiven and nothing is required — you are simply, finally, told what you are hungry for. Many people find it the most liberating hour of their lives. Many people never recover.
encounterFlavor: Choir-singers who name the thing under your thing; a person hearing their own appetite spoken for the first time; a Seraphic envoy who came to condemn this and is very quiet.
questSeeds: Someone was named and it was WRONG, and the Choir does not make that mistake, and so it was not wrong
A Seraph has asked the Choir to name THEIR appetite
